problem id: bd214062
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00000101 -> 00111110
  10011110 -> 01011001
  11110001 -> 00001111
  00110011 -> 10110011
  10011100 -> 11011001
  00110100 -> 11110011
  10100000 -> 11011111
  01011111 -> 10101101

query: 10011010
predicted answer: 01011001
